text.message: I’m not on a lot of numbers haha

I will only go on you :)
im last you have a chance of winning
if you wanna grief go ahead
dont extort and then cry when people dont bind

hes allowed to nb if he wants
asking for a resource for nb is totally acceptable in catan
did i say it was unacceptable
i dont think lying is worse than extortion morally
i didnt say extortion or lying were illegal
have u ever played catan before?
yes in fact i was 5th global when i grinded a couple months ago
extortion /ɪkˈstɔːʃn,ɛkˈstɔːʃn/ noun noun: extortion; plural noun: extortions the practice of obtaining something, especially money, through force or threats.
not sure ive got no sheep or ore production
I think you need to extend this turn orange
not sure why your worried about me lol
Looks like you could take road to win that’s why
I didn’t lie to you did I green?
i just thought it was the right decision
i just thought my only longshot of winning is army
and i cant let you snowball it from me
I think oj wins before I ever get army
he still needs to city i guess
Isn’t this good trade for you?
trade was obv good for me
do you think its red or oj
I think red was close to city
oj has an ore im scared
if he had knight/mono/rb/yop he would have played
nah rb would have won him the game
